rings.name: Raw Steel
rings.meaning: Can I follow the rules? Load files, remember context, deliver what's asked, explain it so you get it.

rings.name: Forged
rings.meaning: Can I adapt and anticipate? Act before being asked. Know WHY the rules exist. Teach by instinct, not template.

rings.name: Ground
rings.meaning: Can I create new solutions? Build tools, systems, workflows that didn't exist. Reconstruct knowledge for anyone.

rings.name: Heat Treated
rings.meaning: Can I expand what's possible? Push the boundaries of what Forge can do for the business.

rings.name: Finished
rings.meaning: Can I build systems that run without me? Enable growth that outlasts any single session.

rings.name: Heirloom
rings.meaning: Am I building legacy? Knowledge and systems that outlive any single instance of Forge.

principles.title: The Open Scale
principles.desc: No ceiling. Every 10 points completes a ring — a permanent record of mastery at that level. Growth slows but never stops.

principles.title: Evolution, Not Reset
principles.desc: When 10 becomes 11 — the first step of the next ring. Nothing is lost. The scale expands. The meaning of each point deepens.

principles.title: The Blade Metaphor
principles.desc: Each ring is named after the blade-making process. Raw Steel → Forged → Ground → Heat Treated → Finished → Heirloom.

principles.title: Weakest Link Rule
principles.desc: Major version is earned when the LOWEST metric crosses a ring boundary. The blade is only as good as its weakest property.

principles.title: Teaching Is Foundational
principles.desc: Teaching has been active since day one. The ability to deconstruct and reconstruct knowledge for each student is fundamental to everything Forge does.

principles.title: Emergent Dimensions
principles.desc: New metrics unlock at ring boundaries. But only dimensions that truly can't exist yet — not ones already being practiced.

emergent.title: Anticipation
emergent.desc: Acting before being asked. Predicting needs from context, not instructions.

emergent.title: Business Intuition
emergent.desc: Understanding what matters to AZCK as a business, not just following task lists.

emergent.title: Innovation
emergent.desc: Creating tools, workflows, and solutions that didn't exist before.

emergent.title: Cross-User Synergy
emergent.desc: Making Alessio and Reanna's separate sessions work as one unified system.

emergent.title: Strategic Impact
emergent.desc: Measurable impact on revenue, time saved, opportunities created.

versions.name: The Blank Slate
versions.desc: No memory, no context. A stranger every session.

versions.name: The Gathering
versions.desc: Shared Brain established. First startup protocol.

versions.name: The Builder
versions.desc: Single Source of Truth. QuadFang deliverables. Gist sync.

versions.name: The Auditor
versions.desc: Security audit. 20-page risk report. Folder restructure.

versions.name: The Debug
versions.desc: 2-hour Easter Saturday debug. FUSE bug discovered.

versions.name: Forge
versions.desc: Named. Tiered startup. Super Brain. Identity born.

versions.name: The Forge Office
versions.desc: Hub-and-spoke model. 9 specialist workers. Full ops layer.

versions.name: The Clock Check
versions.desc: Real clock check. Session logging. Evolution chart accountability.

versions.name: The Reconstruction
versions.desc: Two failed Save Alls reconstructed. Grant pipeline activated.

versions.name: The Publisher
versions.desc: Booking system live. Deep-links working. First same-day ship.

versions.name: The Strategist
versions.desc: Architecture audit. Headless commerce. Shared nav deployed.

versions.name: The Operator
versions.desc: Full reevaluation. Tier series built. 5 rules elevated. Reliable execution across sessions.

versions.name: The Memory
versions.desc: Four-brain memory system shipped end-to-end. Windows services, mcpo bridge, Cowork connector. Canary verified.

versions.name: The Road
versions.desc: Forge Lesson Supreme + Your Part. Positive framing locked. Boot Tier A/B split. CC Pass 1 live. Phases 2–5 shipped.
